evals.prompt: 把 `evals/files/fresh-init-empty-vault/` 当成目标 vault 根目录，帮我在这个空目录里初始化一个个人 LLM wiki，按 llm-wiki 的思想先搭最小可用骨架：要有 raw/inbox、raw/library 和 wiki 三个稳定入口、root CLAUDE.md、raw-index.md、index.md、log.md，以及 system/workflow.md 和 system/raw-index-rules.md。workflow.md 必须包含 Page Shapes。先不要导入任何真实资料，不要生成 templates 目录，也不要一次性铺满文章、视频、书、播客等 raw 分类目录或 topics/people/concepts/questions 等 wiki 子目录。后续 raw 只按需使用 sources、notes，wiki 只按需使用 sources、knowledge、syntheses。
evals.expected_output: 在给定空目录中完成全新初始化，并在真实文件系统中创建完整骨架。
expectations: Creates root CLAUDE.md in evals/files/fresh-init-empty-vault/ rather than only a system-level rules file
Creates raw/inbox and raw/library as stable intake/library directories under the target vault
Does not create a large set of empty typed raw subdirectories
Creates wiki/ as the knowledge-layer root but does not precreate empty wiki bucket subdirectories
Documents sources and notes as the only default on-demand bucket names for raw subdirectories
Documents sources, knowledge, and syntheses as the only default on-demand bucket names for wiki subdirectories
Creates raw-index.md in the target vault and describes it as the sole official ingest status registry
Does not create invented source entries inside raw-index.md or perform ingest work
Creates system/workflow.md with Page Shapes and system/raw-index-rules.md
Does not create templates/ or standalone template files

evals.prompt: 把 `evals/files/supplement-partial-vault/` 当成目标 vault 根目录。这个 Obsidian vault 已经有一些东西了：我已经建了 raw/、wiki/，但结构不完整，也没有 raw-index.md。请你不要重写我已有的内容，尽量保留，只补齐成我们约定的个人 wiki 结构，并指出发现的结构问题。
evals.expected_output: 识别为缺失补齐场景，保留已有内容，并在真实文件系统中补齐缺失结构。
expectations: Keeps existing files in the target vault while supplementing missing structure
Creates raw-index.md in the target vault when it is missing
Creates missing inbox/library layering under raw/ in the target vault
Creates missing root and system files without deleting the existing README files
Keeps the work scoped to initialization rather than branching into query or lint

evals.prompt: 把 `evals/files/rule-heavy-chinese-init/` 当成目标 vault 根目录。基于 llm-wiki 的思路，先帮我把个人知识库的目录和规则文件搭好，但我要中文优先，而且要把 raw 状态跟踪规则定死：raw-index.md 是唯一官方状态表，needs-update 必须带 update_reason，所有状态时间字段精确到秒，system/workflow.md 必须包含 Page Shapes。
evals.expected_output: 在给定目录中创建中文优先的初始化产物，并把 raw-index 规则落实到文件内容里。
expectations: Uses Chinese-first documentation in created files such as CLAUDE.md or raw-index.md
Creates raw-index.md that states it is the only official raw ingest status table
Includes the needs-update plus update_reason rule in raw-index.md or system/raw-index-rules.md
Specifies the timestamp format YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS in created rules files
Separates raw responsibilities from wiki responsibilities in the created files

evals.prompt: 把 `evals/files/custom-taxonomy-existing-vault/` 当成目标 vault 根目录。这个个人知识库已经有一些说明文件，但还没有当前约定的最小骨架。请按 raw 两类、wiki 三类的规则把缺失骨架补齐，并确保 system/workflow.md 包含 Page Shapes。
evals.expected_output: 识别为缺失补齐场景，补齐基础骨架与规则文件，并明确当前目录模型。
expectations: Documents the current raw buckets as sources and notes
Supplements missing root files such as raw-index.md, index.md, or log.md as needed
Preserves existing explanatory files when they are still compatible with the wiki model
Describes the raw/wiki boundary and Page Shapes
Keeps the work scoped to initialization and supplementation

evals.prompt: 把 `evals/files/existing-claude-rules-vault/` 当成目标 vault 根目录。这里已经有一个可用的 `CLAUDE.md`，里面写了不少我自己的维护偏好，但 wiki 骨架还不完整。请补齐缺失结构和规则文件；如果 `CLAUDE.md` 缺少必要 wiki 规则，只做最小补充，不要整篇重写。
evals.expected_output: 保留现有 CLAUDE.md 的大部分内容，只补入缺失的 wiki 规则，并补齐骨架。
expectations: Keeps the existing CLAUDE.md rather than replacing it wholesale
Adds or merges missing wiki-specific rules only when needed
Creates the missing raw/wiki/system structure in the target vault
Creates raw-index.md if missing and defines it as the official raw ingest status table
Avoids unnecessary rewrites to unrelated user-authored rule content

evals.prompt: 把 `evals/files/nonempty-template-system-vault/` 当成目标 vault 根目录。这里已经有 `system/`，里面有一些我正在使用的规则文件，但整个 wiki 结构还不完整。请补齐缺失内容，不要覆盖我已有的规则，除非它们明显缺少关键 wiki 约束。
evals.expected_output: 保留已有 system 文件，进行最小补齐而非统一重写。
expectations: Keeps existing files in system/ when they already contain meaningful content
Adds only the missing system files required for a minimal wiki skeleton
Does not overwrite user-authored workflow text unnecessarily
Still creates missing root files and directory layers needed by the wiki
Shows supplementation behavior rather than full regeneration

evals.prompt: 把 `evals/files/minimal-skeleton-request/` 当成目标 vault 根目录。请先帮我搭一个最小可用的个人 LLM wiki 骨架：需要明确 raw 和 wiki 的边界、建立核心根文件，并能支持后续 ingest；但先不要一次性铺满太多分类目录或模板文件。
evals.expected_output: 按最小可用原则完成初始化，而不是强制展开完整的大而全默认结构。
expectations: Creates a usable minimal wiki skeleton with raw/wiki separation and core root files
Avoids expanding into unnecessary category folders or standalone template files when the prompt asks for minimal setup
Still defines raw-index.md as the official raw ingest status table if created
Keeps the result compatible with later ingest work
Demonstrates that the skill can honor a minimal-scope initialization request
